      🟢 Lead/Customer Tasks 0

      🦅 GHL — Eagle View Replies 0

      Your open Eagle View Reply tasks auto-pulled from GHL. Check the box when you've sent the Eagle View — task stays as a 7-day reminder to also mark done in GHL itself.

      Permanent roles — Iwona · Frank · Ruth · Bogdan · Denise. Add new members via the Secondary tab.

      GHL "Approval Need" Queue Real-time

      Iwona moves customers from "New Customer" → "Approval Need" stage in GHL → you get pinged → approve same-day. Check the box on the right when you've handled it.

      Today's Core Team Tasks 0

      Team tasks due today OR overdue — auto-pulled. Overdue floats to the top so they don't slip.

      Freelancers · part-timers · temp contractors · new hires on trial. Add anyone outside the core 5.

      Today's Secondary Team Tasks 0

      Freelancer / contractor tasks due today OR overdue.

      All Secondary Team Tasks master list — freelancers / temp contractors

      Master roll-up (future + no-deadline). Today's + overdue surface above.

      Active Projects + Initiatives

      Things in motion beyond the recurring rhythm — campaigns, hires, big bets, one-time pushes.

      Brain Capture — Daily Brain Dump

      What this is: a holding tank for anything worth remembering during the day — a link, a document, a phrase, a half-baked idea. Drop it in 10 seconds, pick a bucket (Sales / Marketing / Operations / AI / Personal / Other), and forget about it.

      Why it matters: the Saturday + Sunday Creative Blocks come back here to mine the week — that's where content angles, mailer ideas, and competitor responses come from. Without this, the creative block starts blank.

      Use the orange + floating button at the bottom-right of any tab to add one fast, anywhere in the dashboard.

      My Commitments Recurring obligations — what you consistently produce for the company + team

      Editable all week. Due Tuesday 12 PM — that's when the week locks for grading. Each commitment is binary — delivered or not. Items tagged to a team member also surface as tasks on their team card.

      —

      Don't beat yourself up — pick ONE thing you missed and fix it next week.

      This Week's Appointments Real meetings + scheduled events

      Recurring appointments only. Your daily routine (8 AM personal hour, 9 AM triage, 12–4 PM sales, etc.) lives on the Today tab. Once Bogdan wires up Google Calendar sync, real GCal events will also flow in here.

      1:1 · appointments · meetings Sunday curation / creative Sunday Reflection

      This week's anchors: Tuesday 7 PM Bogdan Weekly · Friday 1:1s (9:30 Iwona · 11 Ruth · 12 Frank · 1 past-customer calls · 2 HOA) · Sunday 10 AM CompanyCam Curation · Sunday 9 PM Reflection

      📡 MASS Leads

      Lead Channels — your ongoing lead-generation systems. Each channel has documents (templates, scripts, briefs), an outreach sequence (email → call → proposal), and a list of targets you're working through. Different from Projects (one-off): Lead Channels are recurring engines.
      📚 HOA Playbook Library 4 DOCS · STORED HERE
      Your real HOA outreach docs — Email Sequence, Mailer, Phone Script, Board Proposal. Copy/paste/download to share when delegating to Ruth, Bogdan, or your Growth Manager.
      CLICK TO COLLAPSE ▲
      💡 To customize wording: click the green ✏ EDIT TEXT button above, or just click anywhere on the document below to start editing. Your changes save permanently and survive reloads.
      📖 How This App Works — Birds-Eye View

      Your operating dashboard runs on one principle: anything you do is either YOURS or it involves a TEAM MEMBER. That's it. Two buckets.

      THE 7 TABS

      Today — your daily home base. North Star ribbon · Focus Ladder · Right Now + Big 3 · AI bar · Today's Routine (live time-aware playbook) + Today's Calendar (real appointments only) · Today's Tasks (deadline = today) · My Weekly Sales Activity (call counters) · My Tasks & Reminders (future + undated master list). Scroll top → bottom = morning → evening.
      Founder — you as a person. Mantra · Focus areas · Founder Score · Evening Check-in habits (unlock 7 PM) · history of your score.
      Team — every team member has a card. Each card shows: what they own, projects they own, your tasks for them, cadence. Add freelancers via the "+ Add Team Member" tile. The "+ Add ask for [Name]" button on each card is how you put a task on their card. All team-tied tasks also appear in "All Team Tasks" at the bottom.
      Customers — Pipeline (GHL) + Customer Journey (Signed → Measured → Awaiting Approval → Ordered → Installed → Reviewed).
      Work — Projects (with subtasks + assigned members) + Capture (brain dump for ideas, competitor sightings, customer stories).
      Review — Week grid · Money (monthly AP + gross) · Commitments (recurring weekly + monthly obligations to your team).
      Settings — AI Companion key · Cloud Sync · Calendar integration · GHL integration · Local backup · this guide.

      THE DAILY FLOW

      Your day's rhythm lives in Today's Routine on the Today tab — an ordered playbook for when nothing urgent is pulling on you. The schedule window beside it shows real appointments only.

      1. My hour — coffee, headspace, no inbox. (8 AM notification ping)
      2. Handle what's live now — overnight texts, hot leads. (9 AM notification ping)
      3. Calendar + leads + system scan. Lock today's Big 3.
      4. Sales + customer touch base — the revenue block.
      5. Soft — Mindful time, 30 min if the day allows.
      6. Soft — Late-night leads (6-8 PM) — only if someone's in conversation.
      Daily — Call Ruth, 10 min — lives as a team task that auto-resets each business day.
      7:00 PM — Founder check-in unlocks (habits + energy + gratitude).
      8:00 PM — Run the Daily Debrief via AI (drafts tomorrow's Big 3).

      THE WEEKLY FLOW

      These are the recurring appointments that DO show on the schedule window.

      Mon – Thu — No pre-blocked appointments. Tuesday adds 7 PM Bogdan weekly (bring 2 blog topics + 2 CompanyCam projects).
      Fri — Team meeting day: 9:30 Iwona · 11 Ruth · 12 Frank · 1 PM past-customer calls · 2 PM HOA calls. Commitments review opens (Review tab).
      Sat — Creative day. Phone off. Big-picture thinking.
      Sun — 10 AM CompanyCam curation · 9 PM Sunday Reflection.

      THE MONTHLY FLOW

      First Monday — Monthly team meeting (everyone except Denise). Orange banner appears on Today.
      End of month — Iwona provides monthly AP + gross. Monthly commitments lock (email campaign, MBR, team meeting).
      First Friday — Monthly Business Review with Denise. Replaces Friday Money.
      Last Friday — Cross-team review with Bogdan.
      End of quarter — Click "Generate Quarterly Report" in Review → History — AI writes your quarterly review.

      THE GOLDEN RULES

      • Tasks bucket #1 — yours: Today tab → split into "Today's Tasks" (anything with a deadline of today) + "My Tasks & Reminders" (future + undated). Personal todos only.
      • Tasks bucket #2 — team-tied: Team tab → on each member's card via "+ Add ask for [Name]". Also rolled up at the bottom of Team tab in "All Team Tasks."
      • The AI Companion (💬 button bottom-left): ask anything, dictate tasks, request a daily debrief or a quarterly report. It can add tasks, projects, customers, decisions, and habits via natural language.
      • North Star = quarterly target — the orange ribbon at top of every tab.
      • Capture = brain dump. Anytime you see/hear/think something worth keeping. Saturday's Creative Block pulls from this so you never start blank.
      • Cloud Sync keeps your data in lockstep across desktop, laptop, phone. Set it up below.

      Tip: Click the summary line above to collapse this guide once you've got it. It reopens anytime you visit Settings.

      AI Companion NOT SET UP

      Chat with your dashboard. It reads your data, gives advice, takes actions when you tell it to. Per-device setup — your API key stays on this device only (not synced for safety).

      SETUP
      1. Get an API key at console.anthropic.com
      2. Paste it below → Save
      3. Tap the 💬 button at bottom-left to start chatting

      Your key is stored only in this browser. Never synced, never sent anywhere except directly to Anthropic.

      ✓ AI Companion ready
      Key: —

      Cloud Sync OFF

      Auto-sync your dashboard across desktop, laptop, and phone. One-time setup, ~60 seconds.

      FIRST-TIME SETUP — uses Firebase (Google, free)
      1. Open console.firebase.google.com — sign in with your Google account
      2. Click "Add project" → name it wg-dashboard → Continue → skip Analytics → Create
      3. In the left menu: Build → Realtime Database → Create Database
      4. Pick a region (any) → Start in test mode → Enable
      5. At the top of the page, copy your database URL — looks like https://wg-dashboard-xxxx-default-rtdb.firebaseio.com
      6. Paste it below and click "Enable Sync"
      ALREADY SET UP ON ANOTHER DEVICE?

      Paste your Sync Code (database URL) from the first device.

      ⓘ Firebase test mode rules expire in 30 days. Before then, return to Firebase Console → Realtime Database → Rules → set ".read" and ".write" back to true and re-publish. Or just re-create the DB (takes 30 sec).

      ✓ Cloud sync active
      Last synced: just now
      YOUR SYNC CODE

      Use this code to link your phone or laptop. Tap to copy.

      —

      Google Calendar Integration NOT CONNECTED

      Connect your real Google Calendar so the dashboard shows your actual events, not just the SOP schedule. Two ways:

      OPTION A — LIVE SYNC (recommended)
      1. Open Google Calendar → click your calendar → Settings and sharing
      2. Scroll to "Integrate calendar"
      3. Copy the "Secret address in iCal format" (long URL ending in .ics)
      4. Paste it below + click Save

      Uses a CORS proxy to fetch. If it fails, use Option B.

      OPTION B — MANUAL .ics UPLOAD

      Download the .ics from Google Calendar (Settings → Import & Export → Export). Re-upload weekly.

      📅
      Click to pick or drag a .ics file here
      Tip: if the file is inside a .zip, extract it first — drop the unzipped .ics
      —

      Access on Phone

      Easiest path to use this on your phone:

      1. Go to netlify.com/drop from your computer
      2. Drag WG_Dashboard.html from your Desktop onto the drop zone
      3. Netlify gives you a URL like random-name.netlify.app
      4. Email/text that URL to yourself. Open on phone. Bookmark / "Add to Home Screen."
      5. Set up Cloud Sync above on both devices — your data follows you everywhere.

      Netlify Drop is free and doesn't require signup for short-term hosting. Sign up free to keep the URL permanent.

      GHL Pipeline Integration NOT CONNECTED

      Pull your real GHL lead pipeline into the dashboard. Live view of opportunities by stage.

      SETUP
      1. In GHL: Settings → API Keys (or "Integrations → API") → create a new key with Pipelines + Opportunities scopes → copy
      2. Paste the key below + click Save (Location ID is OPTIONAL — your API key is already scoped to your sub-account)
      Can't find Location ID? Look at your GHL URL while you're logged into your sub-account — it looks like app.gohighlevel.com/v2/location/XXXXX/... — the part after /location/ is your Location ID. Or skip it entirely — most V1 endpoints don't need it.

      Click Find Me — the dashboard pulls your GHL user list so you can pick yourself.

      Pipeline list populates after Save + Sync.

      —

      ⓘ GHL's API may block direct browser calls (CORS). If you see an error, the dashboard tries a public CORS proxy as fallback. For production reliability, you may need a custom backend — that's a separate setup.

      📦 Local Backup & Disaster Recovery

      Your dashboard's code is the HTML file on Desktop. Your data lives in this browser. A complete backup needs both. The "Backup Now" button below downloads your data — then follow the on-screen reminder to copy the HTML + briefs into your WG_Dashboard_Backups folder.

      🛡️ FULL BUNDLE (one file = complete restore)
      Downloads WG_BUNDLE_YYYY-MM-DD.json containing your data + an HTML snapshot + version metadata. Single file restores everything.
      Restore From Bundle
      Pick a previously downloaded WG_BUNDLE_*.json. Replaces state + offers to save the HTML.
      📦 Quick Backup (data only)
      Downloads WG_Dashboard_state_YYYY-MM-DD.json + shows checklist of files to copy manually.
      Export JSON only (data)
      Just the state file — no instructions.
      Import / Restore
      Load a previously exported JSON file. Replaces all current data.
      Open Backup Folder
      Shows you what's in C:\Users\tannh\OneDrive\Desktop\WG_Dashboard_Backups\ — verify your snapshots are there.
      Browser Notifications
      Get pinged for 8 AM (your hour), 9 AM (triage), 7 PM (Founder check-in), 8 PM (debrief), and Sat/Sun creative blocks. The rest of the rhythm lives in Today's Routine.
      Reset Everything
      Wipe all data on this device. Export first if you want a backup.

      Edit Commitments

      The recurring obligations you track every week + month. Add anything you produce on a cadence; remove what no longer applies.

      Edit Weekly Schedule

      Pick a day, add/edit/remove time blocks. Changes show up on Today and the Week grid.
